channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: Tenable - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.9
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.9 | Tenable Security Center manages vulnerabilities; unvalidated input in asset filters allows remote code execution via Analysis REST endpoint.

item.title: Oracle - Monthly - CVSS Score v3: 2.2-10.0
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3: 2.2-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 1449, Number of critical patches: 0.

item.title: Atlassian - Monthly - CVSS Score: v3 - 7.1-9.8
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score: v3 - 7.1-9.8 | Monthly: Number of patches: 83, Number of critical patches: 18.

item.title: NASA - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | NASA-AMMOS AIT-Core manages spacecraft data and commands, allows unauthenticated path traversal via BSC HTTP API, risking file tampering. More info....

item.title: SolarWinds - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | SolarWinds Serv-U file transfer server; remote code execution vulnerability allows arbitrary code execution as root, less impact on Windows.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.6
item.description: Wednesday 22 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | Google MCP Toolbox for Databases forecasts data; SQL injection and boundary bypass in bigquery-forecast allow unauthorized BigQuery data access.

item.title: SailPoint - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 21 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | SailPoint IdentityIQ manages identity governance; improper OAuth token validation allows unauthenticated access to protected APIs and data.

item.title: Zyxel - Patch - CVSS Score v3: 7.2
item.description: Tuesday 21 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3: 7.2 | Zyxel patched a post-authentication command injection flaw allowing admin-level attackers to execute OS commands on affected devices.

item.title: FreeRDP - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Tuesday 21 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | FreeRDP remote desktop client software; heap overflow in crypto_rsa_common function allows attacker to cause denial of service pre-authentication.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.0
item.description: Tuesday 21 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.0 | Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform manages IT automation; path traversal in pulpcore allows admin to write files arbitrarily, risking system compromise. More info....

item.title: HCLSoftware - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 21 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | HCLSoftware Commerce and Websphere platform for online retail; privilege escalation allows denial of service, data disclosure, and unauthorized admin actions.

item.title: IBM - Security - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Monday 20 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | IBM Guardium Data Protection fixes multiple third-party vulnerabilities (CVSS up to 9.8), including critical RCE, DoS, buffer overflow, and privilege issues.

item.title: GitHub - Patch - CVSS Score v4: 8.6
item.description: Monday 20 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4: 8.6 | GitHub Enterprise Server manages code repositories; path traversal flaw lets attackers write files, inject workflows, and access secrets.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 8.5
item.description: Monday 20 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 8.5 | Google Cloud Firebase Studio manages app development; missing authorization allowed attackers to download others' source code via unauthorized URL signing.

item.title: VMware - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Monday 20 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | VMware Avi Load Balancer fixes seven critical-to-important flaws (CVSSv3 up to 9.8) that could enable authentication bypass, RCE, privilege escalation, and unauthorized access. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: wg-easy - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | wg-easy VPN management tool; weak one-time link token allows attackers to brute-force keys, impersonate peers via unauthenticated route without rate limiting.

item.title: crowdsec - Security - CVSS Score v4: 8.2
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4: 8.2 | CrowdSec protects against malicious IPs; versions 1.7.0 to <1.7.8 allow excessive heap use via unauthenticated gzip JSON decompression.

item.title: Zoom - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | Zoom Communications Zoom Workplace for Windows enables video meetings; improper input validation allows unauthenticated account takeover via network access.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Microsoft o365-moodle integrates Office 365 with Moodle; versions before 5.0.5 allow token forgery via unverified JWT, enabling session hijack. More info....

item.title: NASA - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Friday 17 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | NASA Core Flight System manages spacecraft functions; HS app crash via segmentation fault on telemetry request causes denial of service.

item.title: Wazuh - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | Wazuh security monitoring platform allows agents to inject NDJSON in bulk requests, risking data deletion and alert tampering.

item.title: Splunk - Security - CVSS Score v3: 8.3
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3: 8.3 | Splunk Enterprise logs and monitors data; allows for CSRF attacks to run SPL searches as splunk-system-user, exposing credentials.

item.title: F5 - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.2
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.2 | F5 NGINX Plus web server and reverse proxy; heap buffer overflow via crafted HTTP requests may cause DoS or code execution if ASLR bypassed.

item.title: websockets - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Websockets ws, a node.JS WebSocket library, is vulnerable to memory exhaustion via incomplete fragmented messages allows denial of service. More info....

item.title: Grafana - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.6
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | Grafana MCP Server manages monitoring and alerting; a flaw allows unauthenticated attackers to steal service tokens and perform SSRF via crafted headers.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | Cisco released RoomOS updates fixing multiple flaws (CVSS up to 8.8) including access control, input validation, memory buffer, and encryption flaws.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Thursday 16 July 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
